'''najuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mianserin|mianserin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-j-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mianserin|mianserin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| najuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:næjiyith|næjiyith]] || [[word:næjiyij|næjiyij]] || [[word:næjiyish|næjiyish]] || [[word:næjiyi|næjiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:najujuyuth|najujuyuth]] || [[word:najujuyuj|najujuyuj]] || [[word:najujuyush|najujuyush]] || [[word:najujuyu|najujuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:najuyuth|najuyuth]] || [[word:najuyuj|najuyuj]] || [[word:najuyush|najuyush]] || [[word:najuyu|najuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:najufyufth|najufyufth]] || [[word:najufyufj|najufyufj]] || [[word:najufyufsh|najufyufsh]] || [[word:najufyuf|najufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:najuyuthu|najuyuthu]] || [[word:najuyuju|najuyuju]] || [[word:najuyushu|najuyushu]] || [[word:najuyuku|najuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:najuyuth|najuyuth]] || [[word:najuyuj|najuyuj]] || [[word:najuyush|najuyush]] || [[word:najuyu|najuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:najuyuthul|najuyuthul]] || [[word:najuyujul|najuyujul]] || [[word:najuyushul|najuyushul]] || [[word:najuyukul|najuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:najuyuuthuthu|najuyuuthuthu]] || [[word:najuyuujuju|najuyuujuju]] || [[word:najuyuushushu|najuyuushushu]] || [[word:najuyuuku|najuyuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:najuyuthun|najuyuthun]] || [[word:najuyujun|najuyujun]] || [[word:najuyushun|najuyushun]] || [[word:najuyukun|najuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:najuyuthuoro|najuyuthuoro]] || [[word:najuyujuoro|najuyujuoro]] || [[word:najuyushuoro|najuyushuoro]] || [[word:najuyukuoro|najuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|3027dd6}}
